## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential role for Matt Ressler at GrowthX, exploring fit and alignment on content strategy, SEO/GEO approaches, and company vision.](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a venture-backed, AI-driven marketing agency producing high-volume, quality content for SaaS clients](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Role focuses on developing scalable content strategy processes across accounts, bridging SEO and GEO](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Matt's background in SEO/GEO and agency experience aligns well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Compensation expectations (\~$150k + bonus/equity) to be reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Venture-backed marketing agency with $12M revenue after 1 year](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [60+ clients, onboarding 2 new clients weekly](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Differentiator: High-volume, AI-driven content production (e.g., 150+ pieces/month for Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
  - [Building internal tools/platforms for content creation and GEO tracking](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)

### Content Strategy Challenges

  - [Need for consistent, scalable content strategy across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Current bottleneck: Only 2-3 team members can develop strong content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Goal: Create system/process to facilitate strategy creation and maintenance](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Balance between high-volume output and maintaining quality/relevance](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)

### SEO/GEO Approach

  - [Tracking AI citations and mentions beyond traditional SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic editorial content to cover long-tail queries](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)
  - [Experimenting with content to indirectly drive product awareness (e.g., programming language Q\&As)](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=2292.0)
  - [Challenges in selecting/tracking relevant prompts for AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### Matt's Experience and Fit

  - [Led search strategy for large agency (Critical Mass, Omnicom)](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Experience with enterprise accounts across pharma, e-commerce, finance](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Managed team of 5, led thought leadership on AI/GEO disruption](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Seeking role to build/manage overarching strategy, less day-to-day client work](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)

### Future of SEO/GEO

  - [Monetization crucial for determining trajectory (especially Google's approach)](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=3390.0)
  - [Potential shift to more pay-to-play model in AI-driven search results](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=3446.0)
  - [Importance of creating valuable content to feed LLMs and capture citations](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=3203.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to review compensation expectations and get back with next steps](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=4363.0)
  - [Potential interview with Andy (head of account management/delivery)](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=4241.0)
  - [Possible case study assignment: Develop content strategy for a client](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)
  - [Matt to review additional materials on GrowthX community/products](https://fathom.video/share/44DwTPmnKTNd1VMzJQUZdM-sRoFG7nNs?tab=summary&timestamp=4378.0)
